title: April 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}
'''April 13''' is the 103rd day of the year (104th in leap years). There are 262 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[Guy Boyd]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Ron Perlman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Andy Nyman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Simon Paisley Day]] is born.
*[[1976]] – Filming begins at [[Elstree Studios]] for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] interior [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|cantina]] shots.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars]]:'' "[[The Han Solo Solution]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]] released.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 95|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 95]] published.
*[[1988]] – [[Katie Lucas]] is born.
*[[1999]] – ''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith 3|''Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith'' 3]] published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: Invasion Volume 2—Rescues]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Herb Trimpe]] dies.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars Special: C-3PO 1|''Star Wars Special: C-3PO'' 1]] published.
*2016 – [[Darth Vader (2015) 19|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 19]] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 17|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 17]] published in Germany.
*2016 – "[[The Trouble with Rathtars]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2017]] – [[Celebration Orlando]] begins.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order]]'' trailer is released.
*[[2021]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Yoda's Galaxy Atlas]]'' published.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Darth Vader's Suit|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Darth Vader's Suit]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 22|''Star Wars'' (2020) 22]] pubished.
*2022 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 22|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 22]] published.
*[[2025]] – "[[Big Pooba Problems / Best Bounty Buddies]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2027]] – ''[[The World of Funko: Star Wars]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
